infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Distance Alarm needs your location to track distance to your destination.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Distance Alarm needs background location access to alert you when you reach your destination.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: Distance Alarm needs background location access to alert you when you reach your destination.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Distance Alarm needs your location to track distance to your destination and alert you on arrival.
plugins.locationAlwaysPermission: Allow Distance Alarm to use your location in the background for continuous tracking.
plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Allow Distance Alarm to use your location while using the app.
